items.title: Superdry co-founder James Holder jailed for rape
items.dek: The 54-year-old, of Cheltenham, attacked the woman in her flat after a night out in May 2022.

items.title: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
items.dek: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.

items.title: Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island
items.dek: A 69-year-old woman who later died in South Africa is among those who left MV Hondius at St Helena.
